name: Corda
description_short: Unable to verify. Website content is a PGP cryptographic signature file, not company information. Corda appears to be a distributed ledger/blockchain technology platform, not a consumer finance service.
description_long: Based on the available website content, no factual company profile can be generated for Corda as a consumer finance service. The provided URL (https://download.corda.net/corda-community-edition/4.10.3/community-4.10.3.tar.asc) points to a PGP signature file for Corda Community Edition version 4.10.3, which is a distributed ledger technology platform developed for enterprise blockchain applications. The content retrieved is a cryptographic signature block used to verify software authenticity, not marketing or service information. Corda is an open-source blockchain framework designed for financial institutions and enterprise use, not a direct consumer lending or financial services provider. Without access to actual company information, service descriptions, pricing, or consumer-facing documentation, it is impossible to accurately profile Corda's consumer finance offerings or verify its categorization as a payday-alternative lender. The current category assignment appears to be a data entry error or misclassification. To properly profile this entity, legitimate consumer-facing website content, service descriptions, and company information would be required.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)

NCUA insured — deposits protected up to $250,000

typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
